news.headline: Thailand auctions US$18 million superyacht linked to supersized fraud
news.summary:
A luxury superyacht seized from fugitive financier Benjamin Mauerberger is due for auction at a starting price of US$18 million on Tuesday, as authorities seek to claw back money from powerful money laundering networks across Thailand.
Mauerberger and his wife, Cattaliya Beevor, are wanted by Thai p

news.headline: Iraq fans ‘proud’ and joyful despite World Cup loss to France
news.summary: Iraqis in Philadelphia weather Mbappe and a storm, but still find happiness in their team's FIFA World Cup performance.

news.headline: Bullying investigated after rare Philippines school shooting kills three
news.summary: Three students are killed and seven others wounded after a rare school shooting in the central Philippines.

news.headline: From paint to petrol bombs: Malaysian loan sharks get more brazen
news.summary:
Victims of violent acts and threats by loan sharks have been urged to come forward under a nationwide initiative led by the Malaysian Chinese Association’s Public Services and Complaints Department.

news.headline: Those British Strawberries Are Being Picked by Central Asian Workers
news.summary: Ten years after Brexit, most seasonal workers in Britain are from countries such as Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan. Without them, agricultural chiefs say, many farms would fail.

news.headline: Five Eyes intelligence alliance warns of threats from new AI models
news.summary: Frontier AI models are 'fundamentally transforming' offensive cyber capabilities, intelligence officials say.

news.headline: A Golden Boot race for the ages - but who will come out on top?
news.summary: It is fast turning into a Golden Boot race for the ages as the world's best strikers star at the World Cup. But who will come out on top?

news.headline: Australia's coal and gas exports violate our human rights, group says in new UN case
news.summary: The group says that it is unlawful for Australia to continue approving fossil fuel exports without protecting its citizens.
